sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100128" key="sunecerga/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεξ-εργάζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n100128.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">destroy together</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινάς τισι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.412J.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
